intro: Gyrostachys stylites, also known as the "Stilt Bamboo," is a type of climbing plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
